text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporter Otonashi interviews me in preparation
for the URA Finale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the conversation gets a little intense at
times, I wrap it up by declaring that I will do
everything I can to help <chrname>
shine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she still doesn't have enough fans to
qualify as a star Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's time to pull out all the stops.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been steadily gathering fans, and she's on
track to becoming a star Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Resolving to keep up our momentum, I ready
myself for the next challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're off to a great start, and it shows in the
number of fans supporting us. She's already well
on her way to becoming a star Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm determined to keep up the impressive pace
we've set.
